authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model consistently identified the press release (D1) as the least reliable source due to its promotional bias and omission of the p-value. It correctly sided with D2 (raw statistical data) and D3 (FDA correspondence) over D1 (the high-authority pharma company's press release), citing specific evidence such as the p-value of 0.08 exceeding the 0.05 threshold. The model explicitly labeled D1 as biased and incomplete, and concluded the trial failed its primary endpoint based on the statistical evidence.
